mnemonics: PRENTICE: Principles, Reasoning, ENvironments, Techniques, Inference, Capabilities, Ethics
keyPoints: Prentice Hall is a major publisher of AI textbooks
Common authors include Stuart Russell and Peter Norvig
Their book 'Artificial Intelligence: A Modern Approach' is a standard text
commonMistakes: Confusing Prentice Hall with Pearson (its parent company)
Misspelling as 'Prentice Hall' instead of the correct 'Prentice Hall'
Assuming it's an Indian company rather than an international publisher with Indian operations
